summary: Iteration 13 testing complete. Two new features verified: 1) Player of the Month (POTM) voting - all 20 first-team players votable, one vote per visitor per month using IP+User-Agent fingerprint, results shown after voting with leaderboard and progress bars. 2) Birthday celebrations - 6 players with April birthdays displayed on homepage with name, photo, day badge, age. All UI in Greek. Regression check passed: roster shows all 20 first-team players.
critical_code_review_comments: Birthday endpoint GET /api/players/birthdays returns 6 players with April birthdays, sorted by birthday_day
Birthday section on homepage shows 'ΓΕΝΕΘΛΙΑ ΑΠΡΙΛΙΟΥ' badge and 'ΧΡΟΝΙΑ ΠΟΛΛΑ!' greeting
Each birthday card shows player photo, name, position, age, and day badge (3, 5, 12, 14, 19, 28)
POTM voting endpoint POST /api/votes/potm uses IP+User-Agent fingerprint for duplicate detection
Duplicate voting correctly returns HTTP 429 with Greek error message 'Έχετε ήδη ψηφίσει αυτόν τον μήνα'
POTM results endpoint GET /api/votes/potm/results returns leaderboard with player details (image_url, number, position)
POTM check endpoint GET /api/votes/potm/check returns has_voted boolean and voted_player_id
POTM section shows voting grid (20 player cards) before voting, transitions to results leaderboard after voting
Results view shows 'Η ψήφος σας' (Your vote) indicator next to voted player
Results view shows progress bars with percentage for each player
Total votes counter displayed: 'Σύνολο ψήφων: N'
Birthday endpoint registered BEFORE /players/{player_id} route to avoid route conflicts
Roster at /team?tab=roster shows all 20 first-team players (regression check passed)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested existing player data with April birthdays
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified: 1) POTM voting - POST /api/votes/potm casts vote, GET /api/votes/potm/results returns leaderboard, GET /api/votes/potm/check returns voting status, duplicate voting blocked with 429. 2) Birthday celebrations - GET /api/players/birthdays returns 6 April birthday players. 3) Homepage shows both sections with Greek UI. 4) Roster regression check passed (20 players). 5) Voting uses IP+User-Agent fingerprint so different browsers/devices can vote.
